ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the study was conducted */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the study was conducted */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., field study, greenhouse study) */,
  "experimental_design" TEXT /* Experimental design used in the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "location_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the study location */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the treatment belongs to */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of treatment (e.g., broadcast, banded) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment */,
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fertilizer used in the treatment */,
  "placement_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the placement method used in the treatment */,
  "rate" REAL /* Application rate of the treatment */,
  "timing" TEXT /* Timing of the treatment application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_fertilizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("fertilizer_id") REFERENCES fertilizers ("fertilizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outcome_measures" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome measure */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study the outcome measure belongs to */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment the outcome measure belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the outcome measure */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome measure */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement for the outcome measure */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected for the outcome measure (e.g., quantitative, qualitative) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect data for the outcome measure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measures_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outcome_measures_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* ID of the outcome measure the result belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "stat_test" TEXT /* Statistical test used to analyze the result */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistical test used */,
  "significant" INTEGER /* Whether the result is statistically significant */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Actual data value for the result */,
  "data_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data value */,
  "statistical_test_result" TEXT /* Result of the statistical test used to analyze the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("outcome_id") REFERENCES outcome_measures ("outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizer_placement_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer placement method */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fertilizer placement method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fertilizer placement method */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the fertilizer placement method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nutrient_management_practices" (
  "practice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nutrient management practice */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the nutrient management practice */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the nutrient management practice */,
  "description_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the nutrient management practice */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("practice_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crop_types" (
  "crop_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crop type */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crop type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crop type */,
  "variety" TEXT /* Specific variety of the crop */,
  "growth_stage" TEXT /* Growth stage of the crop during the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crop_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_user" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the study */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed information about the user's role in the study */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions of the user for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results_data" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* ID of the study */,
  "replicate_id" INTEGER /* Replicate number for the result */,
  "treatment_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment for the result */,
  "value" REAL /* Result value */,
  "value_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the result value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_data_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fertilizers" (
  "fertilizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fertilizer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fertilizer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fertilizer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fertilizer_id")
)
